_comment_2: Tyk Classic API definition for p06-rl-dynamic-low. The canonical contract is 10 rps per X-Real-IP value, 1 s rolling window, 429 above limit.
_comment_3: Tyk has no native primitive that buckets on an arbitrary request header. The documented pattern for this axis is per-key sessions (Tyk session-level rate limit IS per-key) plus a JSVM pre-middleware that synthesises one key per IP on demand. See ../_shared/middleware/per_ip_session.js for the full mechanism.
_comment_4: use_keyless: false makes Tyk's AuthToken middleware run after our pre. The pre re-stamps the Authorization header to the synthesised per-IP key, so AuthToken validates the synthetic session, not whatever the client sent (or didn't send).
_comment_5: config_data carries BENCH_RL_RATE / BENCH_RL_PER for the JSVM pre-middleware. Keeping the rate value here (not in the JS file) keeps the cell-level value visible in the API definition itself — every other gateway has its rate value in apis/* or routes/*.
_comment_6: custom_middleware.driver=otto selects the JS VM (otto). The path is the absolute in-container path of the bind-mounted shared middleware (see docker-compose.yaml: ./_shared/middleware -> /opt/tyk-gateway/middleware/bench).
name: bench
